title: The Champion
overview: What goes on within the heart of a Champion? Doubts? Regrets? Determination? Maybe all three? Leon, the greatest Pokémon Champion Galar has known, prepares to face one of his biggest challenges ever!

title: The Eclipse
overview: With a dash of determination and courage, Lillie vows to rescue her mother and bring back her friend Nebby! But be strong, Lillie—there seems to be a sinister presence on the horizon…

title: The Visionary
overview: When chasing your dream, do you give up when everyone tells you it’s wrong? Should you listen? Or do you continue to follow your vision, even if it puts all of Kalos at risk? For Lysandre, that’s never been a question…

title: The Plan
overview: A sinister plot that manipulates both people and Pokémon has been realized! All of Ghetsis’s schemes are falling into place, but what does that mean for the fate of the Unova region?

title: The Rival
overview: No matter how fast you run, your rivals are always one step ahead, pushing you to better your skills. Eventually, you’ll have to face your rival in your travels… for Barry, that time has come.

title: The Wish
overview: Her whole life, Zinnia was told to put her people’s wishes before her own and to uphold her duty to Hoenn. But when the Legendary Pokémon Rayquaza arrives, will she have what it takes?

title: The Show
overview: The curtain rises on the Kimono Girls as they perform a tale of Johto’s Legendary Pokémon! Journey to Johto and discover secrets from this historic region.

title: The Discovery
overview: Did you hear the rumor? What might be the most powerful Pokémon ever has been discovered in Kanto!  Green has begun her search for this elusive Pokémon...but she’s not the only one racing to catch it!
